- `conte

spec.rejected_reason: Defective aibox-sync output. Same-version (v0.21.0→v0.21.0) yet 564 entries marked new-upstream and unchanged=0; affected_files is empty; targets like context/team/roster.md, context/models/MODEL-*, context/bindings/BIND-* already exist locally (committed in 4b56af5 and 19b984c). Source-path conventions inconsistent (some bare 'schemas/...', some prefixed 'context/...'). Applying would clobber the recent roster refresh + new MODEL entries. Symptom of an empty/missing baseline in aibox sync's diff generator — not real upstream drift. Tracked separately in a new backlog WI.
spec.summary: 0 changed upstream, 0 conflicts, 564 new, 0 removed (52 groups affected)
